description: The third planet from the Sun and the only known astronomical object to harbour life. Root class of the Earth Systems Ontology.

contents.name: radiusKm
contents.description: Mean radius of the Earth in kilometres.

contents.name: massKg
contents.description: Mass of the Earth in kilograms.

contents.name: surfaceTemperatureCelsius
contents.description: Current mean global surface temperature in degrees Celsius.

contents.name: globalMeanTemperature
contents.description: Real-time or periodically updated global mean surface temperature telemetry.

contents.name: hasAtmosphere
contents.description: Relates Earth to its surrounding atmosphere.

contents.name: hasLithosphere
contents.description: Relates Earth to its solid outer lithosphere.

contents.name: hasHydrosphere
contents.description: Relates Earth to its hydrosphere — all surface and atmospheric water.

contents.name: hasBiosphere
contents.description: Relates Earth to its biosphere — all living organisms and their interactions.
